name: Banknewport
description_short: BankNewport is a Rhode Island-based full-service bank offering personal and business banking, marine lending, and investment services with 200 years of community roots.
description_long:
BankNewport is a traditional community bank headquartered in Newport, Rhode Island, with a 200-year history of serving local customers and businesses. The bank operates as an FDIC-insured institution backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government, positioning itself as a stable, regulated financial institution. The company emphasizes local relationship banking and commitment to Rhode Island's economic development.

The bank offers a comprehensive suite of products across personal and business segments. Personal services include checking and savings accounts, mobile banking, and credit products. On the business side, BankNewport provides commercial lending, SBA loan programs (7(a) and 504 loans), merchant services (through a partnership with Green PayTech), and payment processing solutions. The bank also operates OceanPoint Marine Lending, a specialized division offering marine financing for new and used boats, and OceanPoint Investment Solutions for wealth management and portfolio advisory services.

BankNewport distinguishes itself through deep community involvement and specialized lending expertise. The bank has awarded over $480,000 in charitable grants across more than 50 nonprofits in Fall 2025 alone, with total 2025 giving exceeding $1.75 million. The institution was named Rhode Island SBA Lender of the Year for fiscal 2025 across multiple lending categories and ranks number one statewide in SBA lending volume. It has also earned national recognition as one of America's Best Banks to Work For (2025), highlighting employee satisfaction and workplace culture.

As a traditional community bank, BankNewport serves personal and business customers in Rhode Island and surrounding areas. While the bank offers competitive products and strong local reputation, customers should note that as a regional institution, it may have fewer digital-first features compared to national banks or neobanks, and service availability is geographically limited. The bank actively warns customers about phone scams impersonating BankNewport representatives, indicating heightened fraud activity targeting its customer base. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: SBA 7(a) loans for small business financing
SBA 504 loans for business asset purchases
Marine boat financing (new and used) through OceanPoint Marine Lending
Investment advisory and portfolio management through OceanPoint Investment Solutions
Merchant services and payment processing (via Green PayTech partnership)
pros: FDIC-insured and backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
Named Rhode Island SBA Lender of the Year 2025 across 7(a), 504, and combined dollar volume categories
Over $1.75 million in charitable giving and community investment in 2025
Specialized OceanPoint Marine Lending division with personalized financing for boats
Recognized as one of America's Best Banks to Work For in 2025 (third time)
Dedicated business lending support with merchant services partnership (Green PayTech)
200-year history and established community roots in Rhode Island
cons: Geographic limitations — primarily serves Rhode Island and surrounding areas, not national reach
Limited mention of digital banking features or mobile app capabilities beyond basic mobile banking app
No specific information on APR ranges, fees, or competitive rate details for products
Susceptible to phone scam targeting, requiring customers to manually verify callers
No mention of business account minimums, product tiers, or pricing structures on main website
best_for: Rhode Island small business owners seeking SBA loan programs and local relationship banking
Boat owners and marine enthusiasts looking for specialized boat financing through OceanPoint Marine Lending
Customers prioritizing community-focused banking and philanthropic values
Investors seeking comprehensive portfolio management through OceanPoint Investment Solutions
diagnosis: BankNewport is best for Rhode Island-based personal and business customers seeking a stable, community-focused traditional bank with strong SBA lending credentials and specialized marine financing. The main caveat is geographic limitation to Rhode Island service area and lack of national banking convenience, making it unsuitable for customers requiring multi-state presence or highly digital banking experiences.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
